cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Thomas could have gone to the football field. The question is asking between what times he could have gone, given all the other activities he was doing. Let me break down each piece of information step by step. First, Thomas woke up at 8am. That's just a starting point, but doesn't necessarily mean he was doing something else right away. Then, David saw Thomas fixing their computer at the electronic store from 8am to 10am. So from 8 to 10, Thomas was at the electronic store. That means he couldn't go to the football field during that time because he was already at the computer store. Next, Jennifer saw Thomas buying lunch at the deli from 10am to 12pm. So from 10 to 12, he was at the deli. So again, he's busy then. Not available for the football field. Then, Lisa saw Thomas walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 12pm to 2pm. So between 12 and 2, he was heading to the Statue of Liberty. So that time slot is taken up. So no football field there. Sarah saw Thomas buying a phone at the electronics store from 2pm to 5pm.
